title: Launch HN: Coasty (YC S26) – An API For Computer-use Agents - Good Sidekick
full_text:
AI & Tooling
Launch HN: Coasty (YC S26) – An API For Computer-use Agents
Coasty, a YC S26 startup, has launched an API enabling developers to build computer-use agents, aiming to automate complex digital tasks.
3 minute read
Total
Shares
Share
Tweet
Pin it
Up next
Published on 16 July 2026
Author
Good Sidekick Team
Share article
The post has been shared by 0
people.
Facebook
X (Twitter)
Pinterest
Mail
TL;DR
Coasty, a new startup from YC S26, has introduced an API designed for creating computer-use agents. This development aims to automate complex digital tasks, with potential implications for productivity and AI integration.
Coasty, a startup from YC S26, has officially launched its API to enable the development of computer-use agents. The platform aims to facilitate automation of complex digital tasks, marking a step toward more autonomous AI-driven software tools. This release is significant for developers and companies exploring automation and AI integration in their workflows.
Founded by Nitish and Prateek, Coasty’s API provides a framework for building agents capable of performing various computer-based tasks, such as data management, web automation, and digital interactions. The company described the platform as a way to ’empower developers to create intelligent agents that can operate across different software environments.’
The API is now publicly accessible, with early adopters already testing its capabilities. Coasty emphasizes that their agents are designed for flexibility, enabling automation in both personal and enterprise contexts. The startup has shared that their goal is to reduce manual effort and increase productivity through AI-driven automation tools.
At a glance
announcement When: announced during YC S26 startup batch,…
The development Coasty has publicly launched its API, offering tools for developers to build and deploy computer-use agents for various digital tasks.
Potential Impact on Automation and AI Development
This launch could accelerate the adoption of autonomous agents in various industries, from customer support to data analysis. By providing an accessible API, Coasty lowers the barrier for developers to incorporate AI-driven automation into their products. If successful, it could influence how digital tasks are handled, shifting some responsibilities from humans to AI agents, and fostering further innovation in automation technology.
Amazon
AI automation software development tools
Amazon View Latest Price
As an affiliate, we earn on qualifying purchases.
As an affiliate, we earn on qualifying purchases.
Emerging Trends in AI-Driven Automation Platforms
Recent years have seen increased interest in AI-powered automation tools, with startups and tech giants investing in similar capabilities. Coasty’s approach of providing an API for computer-use agents aligns with broader trends toward democratizing AI development. The company’s founders highlighted their focus on creating a platform that is both powerful and easy to integrate, positioning themselves within a growing ecosystem of automation solutions.
Prior to this launch, several companies have experimented with AI agents, but few have offered a dedicated API tailored specifically for computer-use tasks at this scale. The timing suggests Coasty aims to capture a segment of the automation market that is still largely unaddressed.
“Our goal is to empower developers to build agents that can seamlessly operate across different software environments, reducing manual effort and increasing productivity.”
— Nitish, Coasty founder
Amazon
computer automation agents API
Amazon View Latest Price
As an affiliate, we earn on qualifying purchases.
As an affiliate, we earn on qualifying purchases.
Unclear Adoption Scope and Technical Capabilities
It is not yet clear how widely the API will be adopted or how effective the initial implementations will be. Details about the API’s technical limitations, security features, and scalability are still emerging. Additionally, the extent to which Coasty’s agents can handle complex, real-world tasks remains to be demonstrated through user feedback and case studies.
Amazon
digital task automation software
Amazon View Latest Price
As an affiliate, we earn on qualifying purchases.
As an affiliate, we earn on qualifying purchases.
Next Steps for Coasty and Developer Engagement
Coasty plans to gather feedback from early adopters and expand its developer community. The startup is expected to release updated documentation and showcase use cases demonstrating the API’s capabilities. Monitoring user success stories and potential integrations with existing platforms will be key indicators of the platform’s future impact.
The Complete Microsoft 365 and Copilot Handbook – Volume II: Advanced Automations, Power Platform Tools, and Expert AI Workflows (Microsoft 365 … Productivity to Advanced AI Automation)
Amazon View Latest Price
As an affiliate, we earn on qualifying purchases.
As an affiliate, we earn on qualifying purchases.
Key Questions
What types of tasks can Coasty’s API automate?
The API is designed to enable automation of tasks such as data management, web interactions, and digital workflow automation, though specific capabilities are still being tested and expanded.
Is Coasty’s API available for public use now?
Yes, the API has been launched publicly and is accessible to developers interested in building computer-use agents.
How does Coasty differentiate itself from other automation platforms?
Coasty emphasizes its focus on creating flexible, AI-driven agents specifically for computer-use tasks, with an API designed for easy integration and broad application across software environments.
What are the potential risks or limitations of using Coasty’s API?
Potential risks include technical limitations in handling complex real-world scenarios, security concerns, and the need for further validation of the agents’ effectiveness in diverse use cases.
What is the long-term vision for Coasty?
The company aims to become a leading platform for autonomous digital agents, enabling widespread automation and AI-powered productivity tools across industries.
Source: hn
